title: Senior Teacher - Doubtnut - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Doubtnut - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Doubtnut invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Doubtnut:
Doubtnut is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut!
